summary: 21 plan-phase risks (RK-1..RK-21) with plan-encodable mitigations, plus 7 risk-derived slice-ordering/reviewer acceptance gates. Respects all operator HITL resolutions; folds simplifier S2-S6.

risks.title: Wave-2 rebalance (R7) ships before the R5 smoke set exists
risks.mitigation: R5 smoke harness blocks R7 slice; genuine build dependency, not an eval-evidence gate; R7 acceptance = smoke set green in no-post mode.

risks.title: Lenses built before the deterministic router exists
risks.mitigation: Router slice precedes lens slices; routing contract frozen as interface; lenses consume it, never re-classify.

risks.title: Computed verdict (R8b) built before versioned finding schema (R8a)
risks.mitigation: Schema slice precedes verdict + R17; schema versioned from first landing.

risks.title: Roadmap-phase deferral smuggled back as slice ordering
risks.mitigation: AC-4 (all 11 lenses) + AC-2 (no roadmap/eval deferral) as hard slice-acceptance gates; only genuine build deps justify ordering.

risks.title: Determinism boundary (R8) grows into judgment territory
risks.mitigation: Both tripwires as review gates: loosen fields not boundary; reject code that rewrites prose or scores beyond declared severity/confidence fields (simplifier S5).

risks.title: Security & auth lens split into two (12th lens)
risks.mitigation: Build exactly 11 named lenses; a split is a HITL question (directive 7), not a builder option (simplifier S2).

risks.title: Double-build of smoke set vs full eval suite
risks.mitigation: One dataset format/runner/no-post mode; smoke set is a tagged subset with CI entry point; single shared harness slice both depend on (simplifier S3).

risks.title: Drift-guard / version stamp built as a second mechanism
risks.mitigation: R14 adds no new mechanism; documents R11's stamp as consumer-readable surface; fold R14 into R11 slice (simplifier S4).

risks.title: Accidental re-implementation of a #194 item
risks.mitigation: AC-1 as per-slice review check; slices touching severity/verdict/re-review cite the #194 baseline they build on.

risks.title: R2 never-auto-approve-with-missing-core-dimension interacts with #194 visibility note
risks.mitigation: R2 slice enumerates core passes (correctness, skill/severity) vs note-and-continue (pattern-triage); smoke case for each.

risks.title: Consumer trigger overrides / extension points regress invisibly
risks.mitigation: §6 interface requirements as slice acceptance on trigger/correctness/severity/thumbs/version slices; correctness-checks.md import kept working; interface checks in smoke harness where feasible.

risks.title: R1 submission robustness not exercised by no-post mode
risks.mitigation: R1 slice needs a targeted test of submission call/body shape independent of the no-post smoke path.

risks.title: Completeness lens Jira/Confluence fetch = untrusted-data injection surface
risks.mitigation: Untrusted-input acceptance on completeness-lens + E3 slices; read-only tokens; fetch confined to non-posting sub-agent; adversarial ticket-fetch injection case in smoke set.

risks.title: Judging vs posting agent confusion
risks.mitigation: Code-owns-safe-output-calls is a review invariant on every lens/sub-agent slice.

risks.title: 11-lens roster + investigation tooling vs 20-min/$10 caps
risks.mitigation: Router tier-scaled budget (only touched-path lenses spawn); one scaling rule + one misrouted-PR floor; R9 caps tool calls per finding; caps documented not gated (operator resolution).

risks.title: Fable 5 first-principles vs timeout
risks.mitigation: First-principles advisory-only, never blocks, degrades gracefully; Fable arms are post-suite experiment notes not build tasks (AC-5).

risks.title: Model launch defaults drift from proposal effort table
risks.mitigation: Centralize effort/model table as single config the slices reference, not per-slice literals.

risks.title: Eval suite (R11) treated as a construction gate
risks.mitigation: R11 is project-sized but never a predecessor to lens/prompt construction; only shared-harness -> smoke-CI ordering is legitimate (regression protection).

risks.title: Eval data dependencies pull consumer repos as a write target
risks.mitigation: Dataset slices read consumer PR/incident records and vendor into this repo; zero commits/PRs against consumer repos (§5, AC-3).

risks.title: Golden-set overfitting / LLM-judge miscalibration
risks.mitigation: Golden holdout + fresh mutations; human audit sample; thumbs labels calibrate judge; adversarial set as hard gate for automatic mode (future policy lever). R11 slice acceptance items, not build gates.

risks.title: gh-aw single-session model constrains determinism boundary
risks.mitigation: R8 sliced schema -> verdict -> rendering; each increment ships behind existing orchestrator, no multi-session redesign.

acceptance_gates: R5 smoke harness blocks R7 wave-2 rebalance; router blocks lenses; R8a schema blocks R8b verdict + R17 (genuine build deps, not eval gates)
One shared eval harness; smoke set is a tagged subset not a separate runner; R14 reuses R11's version stamp
All 11 lenses are build tasks; security & auth is one lens (split => HITL); no roadmap/eval-evidence deferral
Untrusted-input acceptance on completeness lens + E3 slices; safe-output calls stay with the orchestrator
Determinism-boundary tripwires (both directions) as review gates on R8 slices
§6 interface requirements as acceptance criteria on trigger/correctness/severity/thumbs/version slices; no consumer-repo target anywhere
One budget-scaling rule + one misrouted-PR floor; no per-lens knobs; caps documented not gated
not_raised_operator_resolved: blocking-verdict policy threshold (implementer judgment + documented default)
no_decisions_rationale: All four proposal open questions resolved by operator at refine gate; budget caps resolved non-blocking; directive 7 forbids re-raising. Conditional security-lens-split HITL not active (plan builds exactly 11 lenses). No plan-phase build choice depends on an unresolved operator question.
